comment: Pinned vendor dependency versions. Edit manually for major bumps; use update-vendor.sh for patch/minor updates.

notes.sql.js: SQLite compiled to WASM for browser-side database access. Used by data apps (js-tool folders) to query .db files client-side.
notes.react + react-dom: Stuck at 18 — React 19 dropped UMD builds; excalidraw_editor.html loads React via UMD <script> tags and uses React.createElement/ReactDOM.createRoot globals.
notes.@excalidraw/excalidraw: Stuck at 0.17.6 — 0.18.0 has unfixed regressions (canvas size overflow, btoa font subsetting errors) and dropped UMD bundle requiring complex bun build workarounds.
notes.pdfjs-dist: Pinned to exact version; worker and main module must match exactly.
notes.bpmn-js: Major bumps often include breaking API changes in the modeler.
notes.mermaid: v10→v11 had rendering engine changes; test diagrams after major bump.
notes.monaco-editor: Major bumps can change loader API or language service behavior.
